roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:STATUS OF PLACEMENT/DAWT/X:THE PEOPLE HAVE CONFIRMED THAT PROBATION TRANSPORTED THE PAROLEE TO A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/X:THE PAROLEE HAVING ADMITTED A VIOLATION OF HIS PAROLE ON 12-23-21, THE COURT NOW IMPOSESTHE FOLLOWING SENTENCE,/PAJ:6 MONTHS/X:SAID SENTENCE IS STAYED PENDING SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF 6 MONTHS IN THE/X:RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,//X:THE PEOPLE WILL WITHDRAW THEIR PETITION IF THE PAROLEE SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES THE 6 MONTH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/X:IF THE PAROLEE FAILS THEPROGRAM, THE 6 MONTHS COUNTY JAIL TIME THAT IS STAYED WILL BE IMPOSED,/X:CTS AS OF 01-24-22 IS 64 DAYS,/X:PAROLEE IS TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE FROM CUSTODY OR COMPLETION OF THE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/

/CAL: PAROLE PHC/ /X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN  LUGAR  APPEARING/NP/X: 4011,5PC TODAY/CAUSE/X: COVID19 TEST AND TB TEST TO BE COMPLETED BY 1024022/X: TRANSPORTATION PENDING FOR 1-25-22/X: CASE STATUS NEXT DATE/CONT/DOPC/

/CAL: PAROLE PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARINGVIA ZOOM,/CTORD: PAROLE TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT PAROLE REVOCATION PACKAGE/CONT/
